
# i18n (Internationalization)

Localization keys for Enonic XP schema labels.

Reference: https://developer.enonic.com/docs/xp/stable/cms/content-types

## Translation Files

Place `.properties` files in `/xp/src/main/resources/i18n/`:

- `phrases.properties` — default/fallback (usually in English) **(required — always update)**
- `phrases_no.properties` — Norwegian **(required — always update)**

Both `phrases.properties` and `phrases_no.properties` must be kept in sync — every key added to one must be added to the other.

Format: `key=translated text`

```properties
content-type.article.display_name=Article
content-type.article.input.title=Title
content-type.article.input.intro=Intro
content-type.article.input.image=Image
content-type.article.input.text=Text
```

## Key Naming Patterns

Keys follow this pattern per component type:

### Content Types

```
content-type.{content-type-name}.display_name
content-type.{content-type-name}.input.{field_name}
content-type.{content-type-name}.input.{field_name}.help_text
```

Example (`article`):
```properties
content-type.article.display_name=Article
content-type.article.input.title=Title
content-type.article.input.intro=Intro
content-type.article.input.image=Image
content-type.article.input.text=Text
```

### Parts

```
part.{part-name}.display_name
part.{part-name}.{field_name}
part.{part-name}.{field_name}.help_text
```

Example (`info-card`):
```properties
part.info-card.display_name=Info Card
part.info-card.title=Title
part.info-card.intro=Intro
```

### Layouts

```
layout.{layout-name}.display_name
layout.{layout-name}.{field_name}
```

Example (`article`):
```properties
layout.article.display_name=Article
```

### X-Data

```
x-data.{x-data-name}.display_name
x-data.{x-data-name}.item-set.{item-set-name}
x-data.{x-data-name}.{item-set-name}.{field_name}
x-data.{x-data-name}.{field_name}
```

Example (`macros`):
```properties
x-data.macros.display_name=Macros
x-data.macros.item-set.images=Images
x-data.macros.images.image=Image
x-data.macros.images.caption=Caption
```

### Macros

```
macro.{macro-name}.display_name
macro.{macro-name}.{field_name}
```

Example (`image`):
```properties
macro.image.display_name=Image
macro.image.index=Index
```

### Mixins

```
mixin.{mixin-name}.display_name
mixin.{mixin-name}.{field_name}
```

## Rules

- Every key **must** follow the **snake_case** format (e.g. background_color).
- Every `<label>`, `<display-name>`, and `<help-text>` element in descriptor XML **must** have an `i18n` attribute.
- The `<description>` tag must **NOT** have an `i18n` attribute — it must contain only the component name (kebab-case) as plain text. Example: `<description>info-card</description>`.
- The XML element text content (e.g., `<label i18n="key">Fallback</label>`) serves as a fallback when no translation is found. Always add this fallback in English.
- Always add translations to both `phrases.properties` (English) and `phrases_no.properties` (Norwegian).
- Group related strings together; separate groups with exactly 1 blank line.
- Prevent duplicate keys — check existing files before adding.
